name: Kamieniec II
description: Analog resonant phase rotator with 4/6-stage outputs, voltage-controlled resonance, syncable triangle LFO, external modulation input, independent LFO out, and optional Allpass Expansion to 22 stages.

controls.name: Tuning FREQ
controls.description: Sets the base phase-rotation frequency, like a filter cutoff point.

controls.name: Depth
controls.description: Sets how much the onboard LFO and external CV move the phase network.

controls.name: Reso
controls.description: Controls feedback amount and resonance. Can reach self-oscillation.

controls.name: Resonance mode switch
controls.description: Selects wasted, k-holed, or stoned feedback topology.

controls.name: LFO rate
controls.description: Sets the onboard triangle LFO speed.
controls.detail: tens of seconds to low audio rate

inputs.name: Ext mod
inputs.description: External modulation summed with the internal LFO.

inputs.name: LFO reset
inputs.description: Hard-sync reset for the onboard LFO.

outputs.name: Output A
outputs.description: Four-stage mixed output with its own frequency response.

outputs.name: Output B
outputs.description: Six-stage mixed output with its own frequency response.

behaviors.name: Dual output pair
behaviors.trigger: use Output A and Output B together
behaviors.description: The module exposes two different mixed responses, so one patch point can behave like a stereo pair or two parallel phaser flavours.

behaviors.name: Deep resonance
behaviors.description: The feedback path can enter self-oscillation around two-thirds of knob travel, making the module useful as a resonant filter-like voice as well as a phaser.

behaviors.name: Three feedback modes
behaviors.description: The feedback topology changes the number and placement of resonant peaks, giving a wide palette from subtle swirl to aggressive comb-like grind.

behaviors.name: Syncable LFO
behaviors.trigger: patch clock or trigger to LFO reset
behaviors.description: The onboard triangle LFO can hard-sync to external timing, so the phaser sweep can stay locked to a clocked patch.

behaviors.name: Expansion and chaining
behaviors.trigger: install Allpass Expansion or chain multiple modules
behaviors.description: The optional expander extends the stage count to 22, and multiple Kamieniec units can be chained for denser, longer phaser textures.

patchIdeas.name: Stereo sweep
patchIdeas.patch: Send a mono voice through the phaser · take Output A and Output B as a faux stereo pair · slow triangle LFO moves the notches apart · classic widening without external modulation.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Kamieniec II:
* Tuning FREQ: noon
* Depth: low
* Reso: low
* Resonance mode switch: stoned

VCO:
LFO:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> Kamieniec II (Input)
- LFO (Out) >> Kamieniec II (Ext mod)
- Kamieniec II (Output A) -> Output (L)
- Kamieniec II (Output B) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked swirl
patchIdeas.patch: Trigger the LFO reset from clock pulses · the sweep restarts each bar · use the phase rotator like a clock-locked filter animation for rhythmically consistent motion.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Kamieniec II:
* Tuning FREQ: slow
* Depth: medium
* Resonance mode switch: wasted

Clock:
Filter:
Output:

- Clock (Out) c> Kamieniec II (LFO reset)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Kamieniec II (Input)
- Kamieniec II (Output A) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Resonant drone
patchIdeas.patch: Push resonance near self-oscillation · feed a sustained oscillator into the input · Output A becomes a formant-rich drone while the LFO Out can move a separate filter or VCA.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Kamieniec II:
* Tuning FREQ: noon
* Depth: low
* Reso: high
* Resonance mode switch: k-holed

VCO:
VCA:
Output:

- VCO (Saw) -> Kamieniec II (Input)
- Kamieniec II (LFO Out) >> VCA (CV)
- Kamieniec II (Output A) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Feedback color
patchIdeas.patch: Patch Output B back into the external modulation input with attenuation outside the module · the phase network turns more aggressive and nasal, with the feedback mode changing the peak count and harmonic bite.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Kamieniec II:
* Tuning FREQ: mid
* Depth: medium
* Reso: medium
* Resonance mode switch: stoned

Attenuator:
Output:

- Kamieniec II (Output B) -> Attenuator (In)
- Attenuator (Out) >> Kamieniec II (Ext mod)
- Kamieniec II (Output A) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Expanded long phaser
patchIdeas.patch: Install the Allpass Expansion, then use the phaser as a long, dense stage chain for a slow moving stereo wash. One knob sweep behaves more like a resonant room than a short effect.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Kamieniec II:
* Tuning FREQ: slow
* Depth: medium
* Resonance mode switch: stoned

Mixer:
Output:

- Kamieniec II (Output A) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Kamieniec II (Output B) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)
